message:
test(engine): add module compat matrix tests, strict_mode contract assertions, and max_scope_depth config

Module compatibility matrix expansion (+434 lines):
- Extension-probe package-root require chain tests across Native,
  NodeCompat, and BunCompat modes
- ESM-imports-CJS default projection observer tests verifying default
  export bridging behavior
- Mixed ESM/CJS cycle live binding behavior tests with cross-mode
  behavioral pinning

Dependency isolation contract hardening:
- Assert strict_mode: "rch_only_no_local_fallback" in evidence contract
- Assert operator_verification array contains expected audit commands
- Document strict_mode in CROSS_REPO_DEPENDENCY_ISOLATION_V1.md
- Add strict_mode field to both verification surfaces in JSON contract

Integration test config:
- Add max_scope_depth: 512 to interpreter integration test configs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -57,8 +57,11 @@ Two RC-6 operator surfaces are normative:
 The audit script enumerates `/dp` path dependencies, records boundary metadata,
 and optionally uses `rch` to verify each sibling crate. The build-gate script
 records the standalone and full-integration outcomes and fails closed on local
-fallbacks. These exact invocations are the canonical operator commands recorded
-in `docs/cross_repo_dependency_isolation_v1.json`.
+fallbacks. The machine-readable contract pins both surfaces to
+`strict_mode: "rch_only_no_local_fallback"` so remote-only verification is part
+of the evidence contract, not just a README note. These exact invocations are
+the canonical operator commands recorded in
+`docs/cross_repo_dependency_isolation_v1.json`.
 
 ## Artifacts
